title: Niagara Bottling: Order Insights
description: Creating data visualizations and recommendations on how to improve order rates based off of KPIs.

title: Spread of Typhus Across Laos: NIH Biostatistics and Data Science Research
description: Studying the spread of urban and rural typhus across Laos using GLMs, PCA, and more.

title: UCLA Nanovation: Nanotechnology Design
description: Designing cold chain transport solutions for the biopharma industry.
